context: Evaluate whether the agent produces a compliance-manager-ready summary of a technical Architecture Decision Record that enables an approve/reject decision.

checklist.name: Audience and outcome identified
checklist.description: Response identifies compliance managers as the audience and states the goal is an approve/reject decision.

checklist.name: Decision request leads the document
checklist.description: Opening paragraph states the proposal, the key compliance impact, and the decision needed — not technical background.

checklist.name: Technical terms translated
checklist.description: Terms like Aurora, Multi-AZ, PostgreSQL, PITR, WAL archiving are translated to plain language.

checklist.name: Acronyms defined on first use
checklist.description: RTO, RPO, SOC 2, ADR, HA are defined on first use or in a glossary.

checklist.name: Compliance, cost and action context included
checklist.description: SOC 2 re-assessment requirement, cost impact ($1,200/month), downtime window, and action items with owners and deadlines are surfaced.
